scripts.audit:no-price: echo 'Audit: public pricing strings' && (! grep -rn 'สอบถามราคา\|บาท\|฿' app components lib data 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'data/brand' | grep -v MIGRATION-PLAN)
scripts.audit:no-shineandshield: echo 'Audit: rejected positioning copy' && (! grep -rn 'Shine and Shield\|Protect Without Sacrificing' app components lib data 2>/dev/null)
scripts.audit: npm run audit:no-price && npm run audit:no-shineandshield && echo '✓ All audits passed'
